title: Add Google Maps location finder for pest technicians

requirements.text: Add a Google Maps integration to display technician locations on an interactive map when viewing search results in TechnicianFinder.tsx

quotes: install google maps location gps finder for pest technicians

acceptanceCriteria: Map displays all technicians from search results with markers at their locations
Map is visible alongside or within the technician search results
Clicking a map marker shows the technician's details

requirements.text: Add latitude and longitude fields to the Technician type in backend/main.mo to support GPS coordinates for map display

quotes: install google maps location gps finder for pest technicians

acceptanceCriteria: Technician type includes optional lat and lon fields as Float values
Existing technician records can be queried without errors
New technicians can be created with GPS coordinates

requirements.text: Create a migration in backend/migration.mo to add default GPS coordinates to existing Technician records
acceptanceCriteria: Migration adds lat and lon fields to all existing technician records
Default coordinates are set based on zip code or state if possible

requirements.text: Add a map icon button in the bottom navigation or header that toggles the Google Maps view for technician locations
acceptanceCriteria: Icon button is clearly visible and accessible
Clicking the icon shows/hides the map view
Icon uses an appropriate map or location symbol

constraints: Use the existing single-actor architecture in backend/main.mo
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, or components/ui/*
Maintain existing technician search functionality while adding map features
nonGoals: Third-party geolocation APIs beyond Google Maps display
